g.title: PendingNew
g.text: exec_fill(exec_id: str, last_qty: float, last_px: float)
exec_partial_fill(exec_id: str, last_qty: float, last_px: float)

g.title: New
g.text: exec_fill(exec_id: str, last_qty: float, last_px: float)
exec_partial_fill(exec_id: str, last_qty: float, last_px: float)
send_replace(replace_cl_ord_id: str, new_qty: float, new_price: float)

g.title: PartiallyFilled

exec_partial_fill(exec_id: str, last_qty: float, last_px: float)
send_replace(replace_cl_ord_id: str, new_qty: float, new_price: float)

g.title: PendingCancel
g.text: exec_fill(exec_id: str, last_qty: float, last_px: float)
exec_partial_fill(exec_id: str, last_qty: float, last_px: float)

g.title: PendingReplace
g.text: exec_replaced(exec_id: str, new_qty: float, new_price: float)

g.title: Stopped
g.text: exec_fill(exec_id: str, last_qty: float, last_px: float)
exec_partial_fill(exec_id: str, last_qty: float, last_px: float)
